title: version/info: format: allow more json variants
body:
Allow more variants to yield json output for `podman version` and
`podman info`.  Instead of comparing strings, use a regex and add
unit and e2e tests.

Fixes: #6927
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@baude, PTAL. Same behaviour as Docker now although `docker info --format json` yiels `json`.

Not crazy about the cut and pasting of all the forms of json in three places, but
/lgtm
